query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES 
((SELECT id FROM lessons WHERE title = 'Discipleship Principles'), 'What is the primary command given in the Great Commission (Matthew 28:19-20)?', 'multiple_choice', '["Go and baptize people", "Make disciples of all nations", "Teach people to pray", "Build churches everywhere"]', 'Make disciples of all nations', 1, NOW(), NOW()),
((SELECT id FROM lessons WHERE title = 'Discipleship Principles'), 'According to 2 Timothy 2:2, discipleship should involve how many generations?', 'multiple_choice', '["Two generations", "Three generations", "Four generations", "Five generations"]', 'Four generations', 2, NOW(), NOW()),
((SELECT id FROM lessons WHERE title = 'Discipleship Principles'), 'Effective discipleship is primarily about transferring information rather than life transformation.', 'true_false', '["True", "False"]', 'False', 3, NOW(), NOW()),
((SELECT id FROM lessons WHERE title = 'Discipleship Principles'), 'Which of the following is NOT a key component of effective discipleship?', 'multiple_choice', '["Modeling Christ-like character", "Teaching biblical truth", "Providing accountability", "Avoiding difficult conversations"]', 'Avoiding difficult conversations', 4, NOW(), NOW()),
((SELECT id FROM lessons WHERE title = 'Discipleship Principles'), 'What is the ultimate goal of discipleship?', 'multiple_choice', '["To increase church attendance", "To empower others to disciple the next generation", "To create Bible scholars", "To fill leadership positions"]', 'To empower others to disciple the next generation', 5, NOW(), NOW());

VALUES

((SELECT id FROM lessons WHERE title = 'Discipleship Principles'), 'According to 2 Timothy 2:2, discipleship should involve how many generations?', 'multiple_choice', '["Two generations", "Three generations", "Four generations", "Five generations"]', 'Four generations', 2, NOW(), NOW()),
((SELECT id FROM lessons WHERE title = 'Discipleship Principles'), 'Effective discipleship is primarily about transferring information rather than life transformation.', 'true_false', '["True", "False"]', 'False', 3, NOW(), NOW()),
((SELECT id FROM lessons WHERE title = 'Discipleship Principles'), 'Which of the following is NOT a key component of effective discipleship?', 'multiple_choice', '["Modeling Christ-like character", "Teaching biblical truth", "Providing accountability", "Avoiding difficult conversations"]', 'Avoiding difficult conversations', 4, NOW(), NOW()),
((SELECT id FROM lessons WHERE title = 'Discipleship Principles'), 'What is the ultimate goal of discipleship?', 'multiple_choice', '["To increase church attendance", "To empower others to disciple the next generation", "To create Bible scholars", "To fill leadership positions"]', 'To empower others to disciple the next generation', 5, NOW(), NOW());
